menu.title: EU Puzzle
menu.subtitle: Rebuild the map of the European Union

confirm.discardMsg: You have already connected {count} countries. Are you sure you want to restart?
confirm.tutorialMsg: You have already connected {count} countries. Starting the tutorial will reset the game.

welcome.title: European Union Puzzle
welcome.subtitle: Rebuild the EU map by connecting all 27 member countries!
welcome.dragDesc: Click on a country with <kbd>Left Click</kbd> and drag it to an adjacent country to connect it.
welcome.zoomDesc:
Mouse wheel or +/- buttons to zoom.
Drag the background with Right Click to pan.
welcome.snapDesc: Move countries that share a border close together: they will automatically connect!
welcome.keyboardDesc: Use <kbd>Tab</kbd> to select a country and <kbd>Enter</kbd> to move it — no mouse needed.
welcome.clickModeDesc: If dragging is difficult, enable Click mode at the bottom left of the screen.
welcome.hintDesc: The 💡 button at the top highlights the next country to connect if you are stuck

step0.title: Welcome!
step0.text: You are here to rebuild the map of the European Union. The 27 countries are scattered and your goal is to put them back in their place! This tutorial will guide you step by step.

step1.title: The Game Area
step1.text: This is the game area. The puzzle pieces are scattered around. Move two countries with a shared border close together: they will automatically snap to form the map of the European Union!

step2.title: Snap Borders
step2.text: Snap France to Germany. Move the two countries together until they automatically connect. Golden arrows will show you the direction!

step3.title: Info and Fun Facts
step3.text: Now that you have connected the countries, click the pin to discover real information and fun facts! Note: when you connect more countries to an existing group, this card will open automatically!

step4.title: Progress Bar
step4.text: Here you can see how many countries you have already connected to the main group. The goal is to reach 27 out of 27!

step5.title: Settings
step5.text: From the Settings button you can adjust the volume of music and sound effects, and change the text size for better readability.

step6.title: Reopen the Tutorial
step6.text: Have questions during the game? Press the Tutorial button at the top of the page to reopen this guide at any time!

step7.title: Hint
step7.text: Stuck? This button highlights the smallest country not yet connected. Use it sparingly so you do not lose the thrill of the challenge!

step8.title: Restart
step8.text: If you want to start over, use the Reset button. All pieces are reshuffled and you can try again at your leisure!

step9.title: You Are Ready!
step9.text: Now you know everything you need. Good luck rebuilding the European Union! Remember: you can always reopen this tutorial from the button at the top. You can do it!

error.loadGame: Error loading the game. Please reload the page.
